narrative:
Hill 3-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,208 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a modest Republican lean of 4.6 percentage points.
